printed.name: Hip Flexors
printed.setup:
Standing facing back to Ladder Barrel, one leg straight, other leg bent, foot on barrel, knee facing down, hands placed on top of ladder
Note: Bend leg further for additional stretch

movement.inhale: Bend standing leg, moving pelvis foward and down, push pelvis back toward barrel
movement.exhale: Hold position for 3 -5 breathes, lift trunk, return to start position

cues: Bias toward posterior tilt of pelvis
Keep abdominals engaged to avoid lumbar hyperlordosis
